prompt: Google Ads OAuth works perfectly on localhost but in production on Vercel I'm getting a 500 error right after the user clicks 'Connect to Google Ads'. The callback URL never gets hit. Works 100% of the time locally, fails 100% of the time in prod.
assertions: Classifies the bug as ENVIRONMENT (works locally, fails in prod) with explicit reasoning
Recommends checking Vercel env vars (GOOGLE_ADS_STATE_SECRET or similar) before digging into code
Checks for export const runtime = 'nodejs' on Google Ads OAuth routes since they use crypto
Does not jump directly to code fixes before confirming env vars and runtime config
References the correct Google Ads OAuth files (src/app/api/google-ads/ or src/lib/google-ads/)
